001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.math.*;
023import java.time.*;
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.concurrent.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
028import java.io.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
034
035/**
036 * Serializes POJO models to BSON (Binary JSON).
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>Media types:</h5>
039 *
040 * Handles <c>Accept</c> types:  <bc>application/bson</bc>
041 * <p>
042 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c> types: <bc>application/bson</bc>
043 *
044 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
045 * <p>
046 * Java-to-BSON type mapping:
047 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
048 *    <li>Maps and beans → BSON document (type 0x03)
049 *    <li>Collections and arrays → BSON array (type 0x04, document with numeric string keys)
050 *    <li>{@link String} / {@link Enum} → BSON string (type 0x02)
051 *    <li>{@link Boolean} → BSON boolean (type 0x08)
052 *    <li>{@code int} / {@code short} / {@code byte} → BSON int32 (type 0x10)
053 *    <li>{@code long} → BSON int64 (type 0x12)
054 *    <li>{@code float} / {@code double} → BSON double (type 0x01)
055 *    <li>{@link Date} / {@link Calendar} / {@link Instant} → BSON datetime (type 0x09) when
056 *       {@code writeDatesAsDatetime=true}; otherwise ISO 8601 string
057 *    <li>{@link Duration} → ISO 8601 duration string
058 *    <li>{@code byte[]} → BSON binary (type 0x05, subtype 0x00)
059 *    <li>{@link BigDecimal} / {@link BigInteger} → BSON decimal128 (type 0x13)
060 *    <li>{@code null} → BSON null (type 0x0A)
061 *    <li>All other types → fallback to {@code toString()} as string
062 * </ul>
063 *
064 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
065 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
066 * </ul>
067 *
068 * <h5 class='section'>Limitations:</h5><ul>
069 *    <li>BSON requires a top-level document. Standalone scalars, collections, and arrays are wrapped as <c>{value: x}</c>.
070 *    <li>Map keys must be strings. Non-string keys use <c>toString()</c>. Null keys use a configurable placeholder.
071 *    <li>ObjectId (0x07) is not generated; parsing returns 24-character hex strings.
072 *    <li>Deprecated types (Undefined, DBPointer, Symbol, JS with Scope) are skipped during parsing.
073 *    <li>MongoDB-internal types (JavaScript, Timestamp, MinKey, MaxKey) are not supported.
074 *    <li>{@link BigDecimal} / {@link BigInteger} values outside the Decimal128 range (max 34 significant digits,
075 *       exponent -6176..6111) cannot be represented and throw a {@link SerializeException} with a clear message.
076 *    <li>BSON datetime (0x09) is millisecond-resolution, so sub-millisecond (nanosecond) precision of
077 *       {@link Instant}/{@link OffsetDateTime}/{@link ZonedDateTime} is truncated when
078 *       {@code writeDatesAsDatetime=true}. Use {@code writeDatesAsDatetime=false} for lossless ISO-8601 string output.
079 *    <li>Local {@code java.time} types ({@link LocalDate}, {@link LocalDateTime}, {@link LocalTime}, {@link Year},
080 *       etc.) have no instant, so they are always written as ISO-8601 strings even when {@code writeDatesAsDatetime=true}.
081 *    <li>BSON is binary; <c>SpacedHex</c> and <c>Base64</c> subclasses provide text-encodable output.
082 * </ul>
083 *
084 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
085 * <p class='bjava'>
086 *    <jc>// Serialize a POJO to BSON</jc>
087 *    byte[] <jv>bson</jv> = BsonSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>someObject</jv>);
088 *
089 *    <jc>// Create a serializer that writes dates as ISO 8601 strings instead of BSON datetime</jc>
090 *    BsonSerializer <jv>s</jv> = BsonSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().writeDatesAsDatetime(<jk>false</jk>).build();
091 *
092 *    <jc>// Or use the marshaller for convenience</jc>
093 *    <jv>bson</jv> = Bson.<jsm>of</jsm>(<jv>someObject</jv>);
094 * </p>
095 *
096 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
097 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/BsonBasics">BSON Basics</a>
098 * </ul>
099 */
100@SuppressWarnings({
101   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
102   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
103   "resource" // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's serializer session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
104})
105public class BsonSerializer extends OutputStreamSerializer implements BsonMetaProvider, RecordWritable, ArrayRecordWritable {
106
107   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
108   private static final String ARG_builder = "builder";
109   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
110
111   // Property name constants
112   private static final String PROP_addBeanTypesBson = "addBeanTypesBson";
113   private static final String PROP_nullKeyString = "nullKeyString";
114   private static final String PROP_writeDatesAsDatetime = "writeDatesAsDatetime";
115   private static final String DEFAULT_NULL_KEY = "<NULL>";
116
117   /** Default serializer, BASE64 string output. */
118   public static class Base64 extends BsonSerializer {
119
120      /**
121       * Constructor.
122       *
123       * @param builder The builder for this object.
124       */
125      public Base64(Builder builder) {
126         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_builder, builder).binaryFormat(BinaryFormat.BASE64));
127      }
128   }
129
130   /**
131    * Builder class.
132    */
133   public static class Builder extends OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<Builder> {
134
135      private static final Cache<HashKey,BsonSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, BsonSerializer.class).build();
136
137      private boolean addBeanTypesBson;
138      private String nullKeyString = DEFAULT_NULL_KEY;
139      private boolean writeDatesAsDatetime = true;
140
141      /**
142       * Constructor, default settings.
143       */
144      protected Builder() {
145         produces("application/bson");
146         accept("application/bson");
147         addBeanTypesBson = env("BsonSerializer.addBeanTypesBson", false);
148         nullKeyString = env("BsonSerializer.nullKeyString", DEFAULT_NULL_KEY);
149         writeDatesAsDatetime = env("BsonSerializer.writeDatesAsDatetime", true);
150      }
151
152      /**
153       * Copy constructor.
154       *
155       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
156       */
157      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
158         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
159         addBeanTypesBson = copyFrom.addBeanTypesBson;
160         nullKeyString = copyFrom.nullKeyString;
161         writeDatesAsDatetime = copyFrom.writeDatesAsDatetime;
162      }
163
164      /**
165       * Copy constructor.
166       *
167       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
168       */
169      protected Builder(BsonSerializer copyFrom) {
170         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
171         addBeanTypesBson = copyFrom.addBeanTypesBson;
172         nullKeyString = copyFrom.nullKeyString;
173         writeDatesAsDatetime = copyFrom.writeDatesAsDatetime;
174      }
175
176      /**
177       * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
178       *
179       * @param value The value for this setting.
180       * @return This object.
181       */
182      public Builder addBeanTypesBson(boolean value) {
183         addBeanTypesBson = value;
184         return this;
185      }
186
187      /**
188       * The string used to represent <jk>null</jk> map keys in BSON documents.
189       *
190       * <p>
191       * BSON document field names cannot be <jk>null</jk>. When serializing a {@link Map} with a <jk>null</jk> key,
192       * this string is used as the field name. When parsing, a field with this name is stored with <jk>null</jk>
193       * as the key.
194       *
195       * @param value The placeholder string for null keys. Default is <js>"&lt;NULL&gt;"</js>.
196       * @return This object.
197       */
198      public Builder nullKeyString(String value) {
199         nullKeyString = value == null ? DEFAULT_NULL_KEY : value;
200         return this;
201      }
202
203      /**
204       * Use BSON datetime type for dates. When <jk>false</jk>, dates are serialized as ISO-8601 strings.
205       *
206       * @param value The value for this setting.
207       * @return This object.
208       */
209      public Builder writeDatesAsDatetime(boolean value) {
210         writeDatesAsDatetime = value;
211         return this;
212      }
213
214      @Override /* OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<?> */
215      public Builder binaryFormat(BinaryFormat value) {
216         super.binaryFormat(value);
217         return this;
218      }
219
220      @Override /* Serializer.Builder<?> */
221      public Builder keepNullProperties() {
222         super.keepNullProperties();
223         return this;
224      }
225
226      @Override /* Serializer.Builder<?> */
227      public Builder keepNullProperties(boolean value) {
228         super.keepNullProperties(value);
229         return this;
230      }
231
232      @Override /* Serializer.Builder<?> */
233      public Builder addRootType() {
234         super.addRootType();
235         return this;
236      }
237
238      @Override /* Serializer.Builder<?> */
239      public Builder addRootType(boolean value) {
240         super.addRootType(value);
241         return this;
242      }
243
244      @Override /* Context.Builder<?> */
245      public BsonSerializer build() {
246         return cache(CACHE).build(BsonSerializer.class);
247      }
248
249      @Override /* Context.Builder<?> */
250      public HashKey hashKey() {
251         return HashKey.of(super.hashKey(), addBeanTypesBson, nullKeyString, writeDatesAsDatetime);
252      }
253
254      @Override /* Context.Builder<?> */
255      public Builder copy() {
256         return new Builder(this);
257      }
258   }
259
260   /** Default serializer, spaced-hex string output. */
261   public static class SpacedHex extends BsonSerializer {
262
263      /**
264       * Constructor.
265       *
266       * @param builder The builder for this object.
267       */
268      public SpacedHex(Builder builder) {
269         super(builder.binaryFormat(BinaryFormat.SPACED_HEX));
270      }
271   }
272
273   /** Default serializer, all default settings. */
274   public static final BsonSerializer DEFAULT = new BsonSerializer(create());
275   /** Default serializer, spaced-hex string output. */
276   public static final BsonSerializer DEFAULT_SPACED_HEX = new SpacedHex(create());
277   /** Default serializer, BASE64 string output. */
278   public static final BsonSerializer DEFAULT_BASE64 = new Base64(create());
279
280   /**
281    * Creates a new builder for this object.
282    *
283    * @return A new builder.
284    */
285   public static Builder create() {
286      return new Builder();
287   }
288
289   protected final boolean addBeanTypesBson;
290   protected final String nullKeyString;
291   protected final boolean writeDatesAsDatetime;
292
293   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,BsonBeanPropertyMeta> bsonBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
294   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,BsonClassMeta> bsonClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
295
296   /**
297    * Constructor.
298    *
299    * @param builder The builder for this object.
300    */
301   public BsonSerializer(Builder builder) {
302      super(builder);
303      addBeanTypesBson = builder.addBeanTypesBson;
304      nullKeyString = builder.nullKeyString;
305      writeDatesAsDatetime = builder.writeDatesAsDatetime;
306   }
307
308   @Override /* Context */
309   public Builder copy() {
310      return new Builder(this);
311   }
312
313   @Override /* Context */
314   public BsonSerializerSession.Builder createSession() {
315      return BsonSerializerSession.create(this);
316   }
317
318   @Override /* BsonMetaProvider */
319   public BsonBeanPropertyMeta getBsonBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
320      if (bpm == null)
321         return BsonBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT;
322      return bsonBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new BsonBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
323   }
324
325   @Override /* BsonMetaProvider */
326   public BsonClassMeta getBsonClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
327      return bsonClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new BsonClassMeta(k, this));
328   }
329
330   @Override /* Context */
331   public BsonSerializerSession getSession() {
332      return createSession().build();
333   }
334
335   @Override
336   protected final boolean isAddBeanTypes() {
337      return addBeanTypesBson || super.isAddBeanTypes();
338   }
339
340   @Override /* OutputStreamSerializer */
341   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
342      return super.properties()
343         .a(PROP_addBeanTypesBson, addBeanTypesBson)
344         .a(PROP_nullKeyString, nullKeyString)
345         .a(PROP_writeDatesAsDatetime, writeDatesAsDatetime);
346   }
347
348   /**
349    * Convenience delegator for the whole-value {@link RecordWriter} using <b>default session
350    * arguments</b>.  The real implementation lives on
351    * {@link BsonSerializerSession#serializeRecords(Object)}.
352    *
353    * @param output The output.
354    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter}.
355    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
356    */
357   @Override /* RecordWritable */
358   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
359      return getSession().serializeRecords(output);
360   }
361
362   /**
363    * Convenience delegator for the buffered array-element {@link RecordWriter} using <b>default
364    * session arguments</b>.  BSON's wire format requires the entire document byte-length up front
365    * (length prefix at every nesting level), so streaming without buffering is not possible.  The
366    * real implementation lives on {@link BsonSerializerSession#serializeArrayRecords(Object)}.
367    *
368    * @param output The output.
369    * @return A buffered {@link RecordWriter}.
370    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
371    */
372   @Override /* ArrayRecordWritable */
373   public RecordWriter serializeArrayRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
374      return getSession().serializeArrayRecords(output);
375   }
376
377   /**
378    * The BSON record writer is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
379    *
380    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
381    */
382   @Override /* RecordWritable */
383   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
384
385   /**
386    * The BSON array-record writer is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
387    *
388    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
389    */
390   @Override /* ArrayRecordWritable */
391   public boolean isArrayRecordStreaming() { return false; }
392}
